title: May 2022 to-do — OSIG workbook, Bob Dylan ticket, flip-phone aspiration
html:
TL;DR

  • Standard sophomore-year admin to-do from May 2022: OSIG workbook, project pitch, MTH quiz, 4-year academic plan for advising, JCEF info, deodorant + detergent.
  • Flagged inside the list: "Buy a flip phone" — earliest instance of Yahir's recurring anti smartphone impulse (which recurs through 2024–25 brick-phone fantasies).
  • Bob Dylan concert ticket on the to-do — a small but rare data point on Yahir's 2022 live-music attendance (bob dylan alongside the ahmad jamal / bill evans jazz listening cluster).
  • "Mom gift" and "send info to JCEF" present together — the jcef scholarship admin runs in parallel with family-care reminders.
  • "Apply to analytics job position" — sophomore-Yahir was still casting for entry-level data jobs before the osig / corvallis crypto club / founder pivot.

Key items

"Buy a flip phone"

"start chilling on master plan"

Why it matters

Three small but graph-useful signals:

  1. The anti smartphone impulse thread predates the brick-phone discourse Yahir engages with in 2024–25 — it was already in his head by May 2022.
  2. bob dylan joins the music-attendance log alongside ahmad jamal (Oct 2022) and the Lincoln Jazz Center cluster.
  3. "Master plan" as a self-managed concept appears here in casual form, way before the formal letter to future self / mom house by the river goal writeups.

Open questions

  • Did he actually buy the flip phone? (No evidence either way; brick-phone fantasy recurs but appears unconsummated through 2026.)
  • Did he go to the bob dylan show? (Worth cross-referencing later 2022 notes.)
  • What was the "analytics job position"? — possible LinkedIn / Handshake application, no follow-up trace.

Wikilinks
